scope: Path 1 local — V0 boundary checkpoint on Z/10

source_1.rationale: V0_Z meets majority + default alignment; V0_H meets neither.

source_2.rationale: V0_H meets all three criteria (minority, override, restricted to h); V0_Z meets none.

source_3a.rationale: Attractor privilege at excluded-side = hold at boundary = coherent under Map-V0-I.

source_3b.rationale: Attractor privilege at persistent-side = gravity well = coherent under Map-V0-II.

source_4.rationale: V0_H is exactly 2 swap-symmetric cells; V0_Z is 17 cells.
